vulnerability.reference: Automated moderation lacks human verification, allowing AI-generated content with misleading textures to pass through.
vulnerability.generated: Moderators rely solely on detector alerts; high false-alarm rates breed alarm fatigue, causing dismissal of true generated-image flags.

impact.reference: False negatives enable wide dissemination of disinformation, manipulating public discourse and undermining platform integrity.
impact.generated: Undetected AI-generated images circulate, spreading disinformation and undermining information integrity across the platform.

dose_response.reference: Reconstruction-error-based detection fails to catch AI-generated images, and automated moderation without human verification lets them spread, enabling wide disinformation and undermining platform integrity.
dose_response.generated: Reconstruction-error-based detection misclassifies genuine images with diffusion-like textures, through content moderators using AI tools, triggering alarm fatigue and dismissal of true flags, leading to undetected AI-generated images spreading disinformation and undermining integrity.
